mapper.select: SELECT * FROM event.users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM event.users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT u.user_seq ,u.user_id ,u.email ,u.name ,u.position ,u.user_type ,u.status ,u.created_at ,u.updated_at ,o.organization_seq ,o.name AS organization_name
,o.org_type
,CASE WHEN u.status = 'pending' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS approval_pending FROM event.users u LEFT JOIN event.organization_members om ON om.user_seq = u.user_seq LEFT JOIN event.organizations o ON o.organization_seq = om.organization_seq WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.status != 'withdrawn'
AND ( LOWER(u.user_id) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(u.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(u.email) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(o.name, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') )
AND u.user_type = #{userType}
AND u.status = #{status}
ORDER BY CASE WHEN u.status = 'pending' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ,CASE u.user_type WHEN 'admin' THEN 0 WHEN 'organization' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ,u.created_at DESC NULLS LAST ,u.user_seq DESC

SELECT u.user_seq ,u.user_id ,u.email ,u.name ,u.position ,u.user_type ,u.status ,u.created_at ,u.updated_at ,o.organization_seq ,o.name AS organization_name
,o.org_type ,o.contact_email ,o.contact_phone ,o.website ,o.grade
FROM event.users u LEFT JOIN event.organization_members om ON om.user_seq = u.user_seq LEFT JOIN event.organizations o ON o.organization_seq = om.organization_seq WHERE u.user_seq = #{userSeq} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE event.users SET status = 'active' ,updated_by = #{updatedBy} ,updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} AND deleted_at IS NULL
